en_title: Hideo Kojima Says Upcoming Xbox Horror Game OD Has a Special System for People Who Are Too Scared to Keep Playing
cn_title: 小岛秀夫称XBOX恐怖游戏《OD》为胆怯玩家设计特殊系统
subtitle: 专为胆小玩家设计
opus_summary: 小岛秀夫透露XBOX恐怖游戏《OD》包含一个为胆怯玩家准备的特殊系统。该作与乔丹·皮尔合作开发，曾遭多家公司拒绝，最终由菲尔·斯宾塞签下并获继任者支持。

paragraphs.en: Hideo Kojima has teased his upcoming Xbox horror game, OD , revealing it includes a special system designed for people who are too scared to keep playing.
paragraphs.cn: 小岛秀夫透露了他即将推出的XBOX恐怖游戏《OD》，称其中包含一个专为胆小到不敢继续游玩的玩家设计的特殊系统。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to Entertainment Weekly , Kojima stopped short of explaining exactly how this new system works, saying doing so would get him into trouble.
paragraphs.cn: 在接受《娱乐周刊》采访时，小岛秀夫没有详细解释这个新系统究竟如何运作，称如果说了会给他惹麻烦。

paragraphs.en: "I wanted to go beyond the limit of the 'scariness' that other games had reached,” Kojima said. “It's a single-player game, and I wanted to make it as scary as possible. But for those that might stop playing when it gets too scary, I have thought of a system that will allow them to keep going. I can't say much more, because it'll give too much of a hint on the system, and I could get in trouble for saying too much!"
paragraphs.cn: 小岛秀夫说：「我想超越其他游戏达到的『恐怖』极限。这是一款单人游戏，我想让它尽可能恐怖。但对于那些可能因为太恐怖而停止游玩的玩家，我想出了一个让他们能继续下去的系统。我不能说太多，因为这会透露太多关于这个系统的信息，我说太多可能会惹上麻烦！」

paragraphs.en: OD, published by Xbox Game Studios in collaboration with Get Out director Jordan Peele, is still shrouded in mystery, but we do know something of what to expect. The original plan was for the game to feature three main actors: Sophia Lillis, Hunter Schafer, and the late Udo Kier. Kier died in November aged 81 , and while Kojima Productions had completed a scan of the legendary actor, it didn’t manage a shoot in time.
paragraphs.cn: 《OD》由XBOX游戏工作室与《逃出绝命镇》导演乔丹·皮尔合作发行，至今仍笼罩在神秘之中，但我们确实知道一些值得期待的内容。最初计划由三位主演出演：Sophia Lillis、Hunter Schafer和已故的Udo Kier。Kier于11月去世，享年81岁，尽管小岛工作室已完成对这位传奇演员的扫描，但未能及时进行拍摄。

paragraphs.en: EW said Kojima wouldn’t discuss Kier’s involvement with OD, or say if he’s been recast, but did confirm filming has now properly begun with the game’s various actors.
paragraphs.cn: 《娱乐周刊》表示，小岛不愿讨论Kier在《OD》中的参与情况，也不愿透露是否已换角，但确认目前已正式开始与游戏的各位演员进行拍摄。

paragraphs.en: "I wanted to do something new. I wanted to do something different," Kojima said. "I had this OD concept since I was working on DS1 [Death Stranding] and I was working on it just by myself. I can't reveal much detail, but it's something that no one has ever seen before. A new game system."
paragraphs.cn: 小岛说：「我想做点新的东西。我想做点不同的东西。我从开发《死亡搁浅》时就有了《OD》这个概念，当时是我一个人在构思。我不能透露太多细节，但这是前所未有的东西，一种新的游戏系统。」

paragraphs.en: "I pitched to many people, to the big companies, and also to the up-and-coming companies. All of them said the same thing," Kojima continued. "They said that I'm crazy, and that they really don't understand the concept — that they will not be able to do it."
paragraphs.cn: 「我向很多人推介过，向大公司，也向新兴公司。他们的回答都是一样的，」小岛继续说道。「他们说我是疯了，他们根本理解不了这个概念——他们做不到。」

paragraphs.en: Former Xbox boss Phil Spencer did understand the concept, however, and signed the game. Spencer was replaced at the top of Microsoft’s gaming business earlier this year by Asha Sharma, who told EW she’s just as keen on it.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，前XBOX负责人菲尔·斯宾塞却理解了这个概念，并签下了这款游戏。今年早些时候，斯宾塞在微软游戏业务的最高职位被Asha Sharma接替，后者向《娱乐周刊》表示，她对这款游戏同样充满热情。

paragraphs.en: “I've got great artists and creatives that can pick a great game better than I can, and so I want to give it space, but most importantly, I think it just represents another kind of game,” Sharma said.
paragraphs.cn: 「我有很棒的艺术家和创意人才，他们挑选游戏的能力远胜于我，所以我希望能给他们留出空间。但更重要的是，我觉得这款游戏代表了另一种游戏类型。」Sharma说道。

paragraphs.en: A game like OD tells Sharma that Xbox has "not reached the boundary of games," Sharma continued, "and, therefore, we need to make sure our platform is sufficiently open so more creators and developers can come on board and be successful, because the next Kojima is yet to be known."
paragraphs.cn: 像《OD》这样的游戏让Sharma意识到，XBOX「尚未触及游戏形式的边界」，Sharma接着说道，「因此，我们需要确保我们的平台足够开放，让更多的创作者和开发者能够加入并取得成功，因为下一个小岛秀夫还尚未为人所知。」

paragraphs.en: Based on those comments, you’d imagine that OD safe from Microsoft’s big Xbox “reset,” which will reportedly result in significant layoffs across the business, potential studio closures, and even game cancelations. IGN has asked Microsoft for comment on recent reports about those potential layoffs, which are said to be due by the end of this month, but it has yet to respond.
paragraphs.cn: 基于这些评论，你或许会认为《OD》不会受到微软XBOX大规模「重置」的影响——据报道，此次重置将导致整个业务部门的大规模裁员、潜在的工作室关闭，甚至游戏项目的取消。IGN已就近期有关裁员的报道向微软寻求置评，据悉裁员预计将在本月底进行，但微软尚未做出回应。

paragraphs.en: OD isn't the first time Kojima has dabbled in horror, of course. P.T. is his uniquely terrifying spin on the horror genre , presented via a home filled with unexpected encounters and bizarre mysteries. In the end, P.T. revealed itself to be a "Playable Trailer" for the secret project Silent Hills, which never came to fruition.
paragraphs.cn: 《OD》并非小岛秀夫首次涉足恐怖游戏，这一点当然无需多言。《P.T.》就是他对恐怖类型独具一格的恐怖演绎，通过一个充满意外遭遇和离奇怪异的房子来呈现。最终，《P.T.》被揭示为秘密项目《寂静岭》(Silent Hills)的一部「可玩预告片」(Playable Trailer)，而后者最终未能问世。

paragraphs.en: Unfortunately, Konami cancelled Silent Hills in 2015 after a painfully public fallout with Kojima. The free-to-play demo was then scrubbed from PlayStation Network, provoking false rumors that the company was removing already downloaded copies of the demo from PS4 consoles worldwide. OD seems to pick up where P.T. left off, at least in spirit, and its latest trailer suggests it's going to be every bit as terrifying , sparking speculation that it is connected to P.T. in some way .
paragraphs.cn: 不幸的是，科乐美在2015年取消了《寂静岭》(Silent Hills)，此前与小岛秀夫经历了痛苦的公开决裂。这款免费试玩版随后从PlayStation Network下架，引发了谣言，称该公司正在从全球PS4主机上删除玩家已下载的试玩版，但这些谣言并不属实。《OD》似乎接过了《P.T.》的衣钵，至少在精神上如此，其最新预告片表明它同样恐怖，引发了外界猜测它可能在某种程度上与《P.T.》有所关联。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在X上找到他 @wyp100，或通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，也可通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
